---
title: 'Now Subject JSON Example'
description: 'Example JSON output for real-time subject data. Demonstrates the structure of astrological data calculated for the current moment.'
---

# Now Subject Example

Endpoint: `/api/v5/now/subject`

## Request Body
```json
{
  "name": "Current Sky",
  "zodiac_type": "Tropical",
  "houses_system_identifier": "P"
}
```

## Response Body
